## Meeting Purpose

Weekly sync between Knapsack and GrowthX to discuss SEO content strategy and progress.

## Key Takeaways

  - [Knapsack targeting Oct 2nd launch for Mac app; Windows version to follow](https://fathom.video/share/4HyYBzUKSgNuy6zxinUF7dQx7J6mesgs?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)
  - [SEO strategy showing initial traction with impressions and clicks](https://fathom.video/share/4HyYBzUKSgNuy6zxinUF7dQx7J6mesgs?tab=summary&timestamp=105.0)
  - [Content approach balances specific use cases with broader SEO-friendly topics](https://fathom.video/share/4HyYBzUKSgNuy6zxinUF7dQx7J6mesgs?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [SEO is a long-term strategy; expectations set for gradual growth in impressions and clicks](https://fathom.video/share/4HyYBzUKSgNuy6zxinUF7dQx7J6mesgs?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)

## Topics

### Product Launch Updates

  - [Targeting October 2nd for Mac app launch](https://fathom.video/share/4HyYBzUKSgNuy6zxinUF7dQx7J6mesgs?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)
  - [All hands on deck to prepare the app](https://fathom.video/share/4HyYBzUKSgNuy6zxinUF7dQx7J6mesgs?tab=summary&timestamp=13.0)
  - [Windows version to follow later](https://fathom.video/share/4HyYBzUKSgNuy6zxinUF7dQx7J6mesgs?tab=summary&timestamp=67.0)
  - [New web design vendor (WebStacks) engaged for website redesign](https://fathom.video/share/4HyYBzUKSgNuy6zxinUF7dQx7J6mesgs?tab=summary&timestamp=29.0)

### SEO Content Strategy

  - [Initial traction: seeing impressions and clicks on some articles](https://fathom.video/share/4HyYBzUKSgNuy6zxinUF7dQx7J6mesgs?tab=summary&timestamp=105.0)
  - [Balancing specific use cases with broader, SEO-friendly topics](https://fathom.video/share/4HyYBzUKSgNuy6zxinUF7dQx7J6mesgs?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [Using umbrella terms (e.g., "generative AI") to cover specific automation processes](https://fathom.video/share/4HyYBzUKSgNuy6zxinUF7dQx7J6mesgs?tab=summary&timestamp=282.0)
  - [Introducing healthcare topics to broaden scope for Google crawling](https://fathom.video/share/4HyYBzUKSgNuy6zxinUF7dQx7J6mesgs?tab=summary&timestamp=411.0)
  - [Keyword research using SEMrush and competitor analysis](https://fathom.video/share/4HyYBzUKSgNuy6zxinUF7dQx7J6mesgs?tab=summary&timestamp=499.0)
  - [Focusing on keywords with sufficient traffic and manageable difficulty](https://fathom.video/share/4HyYBzUKSgNuy6zxinUF7dQx7J6mesgs?tab=summary&timestamp=208.0)

### SEO Progress and Expectations

  - [Currently at very low impressions, domain authority zero](https://fathom.video/share/4HyYBzUKSgNuy6zxinUF7dQx7J6mesgs?tab=summary&timestamp=629.0)
  - [SEO is a long-term strategy; cheaper but slower than paid ads](https://fathom.video/share/4HyYBzUKSgNuy6zxinUF7dQx7J6mesgs?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Expect gradual growth: from few impressions to hundreds, then tens of clicks per day](https://fathom.video/share/4HyYBzUKSgNuy6zxinUF7dQx7J6mesgs?tab=summary&timestamp=848.0)
  - [Impressions data includes all search appearances, including team searches](https://fathom.video/share/4HyYBzUKSgNuy6zxinUF7dQx7J6mesgs?tab=summary&timestamp=911.0)
  - [Comparable clients (e.g., Madam Joon) saw significant growth over 2-3 months](https://fathom.video/share/4HyYBzUKSgNuy6zxinUF7dQx7J6mesgs?tab=summary&timestamp=1039.0)

### Content Quality and Optimization

  - [Continuous improvement of article quality and richness](https://fathom.video/share/4HyYBzUKSgNuy6zxinUF7dQx7J6mesgs?tab=summary&timestamp=1269.0)
  - [Plan to revisit and optimize published articles based on performance](https://fathom.video/share/4HyYBzUKSgNuy6zxinUF7dQx7J6mesgs?tab=summary&timestamp=1293.0)
  - [Refining process to include more detailed examples and scenarios](https://fathom.video/share/4HyYBzUKSgNuy6zxinUF7dQx7J6mesgs?tab=summary&timestamp=1300.0)

### Future Content Plans

  - [Introducing 3-4 healthcare-related articles](https://fathom.video/share/4HyYBzUKSgNuy6zxinUF7dQx7J6mesgs?tab=summary&timestamp=411.0)
  - [Planning to implement content tags after healthcare topics are introduced](https://fathom.video/share/4HyYBzUKSgNuy6zxinUF7dQx7J6mesgs?tab=summary&timestamp=1488.0)
  - [Considering changing "blogs" label to "articles" on the website](https://fathom.video/share/4HyYBzUKSgNuy6zxinUF7dQx7J6mesgs?tab=summary&timestamp=1455.0)

## Next Steps

  - Continue producing content, including healthcare-related articles
  - Implement content tags after healthcare topics are introduced
  - Change "blogs" label to "articles" on the website
  - Monitor and analyze performance data to inform future content strategy
  - Continuously optimize existing articles based on performance
